name: witness-qa
description: Evidence-backed agentic QA for web, Electron desktop, CLI, API, Unity/Unreal games, screenshots, and visual software.

interface.shortDescription: Test software through real actions and visual evidence
interface.longDescription: Drive web apps, Electron renderers, CLIs, APIs, Unity/Unreal builds, games, and screenshot sequences like a human tester; preserve evidence; report reproducible findings; and verify fixes.
defaultPrompt: Use Witness to test this project as a real user and report evidence-backed defects.
Use Witness to inspect this game's visuals across frames and verify any fixes.
